name: May 2026 cargo-van compression override
purpose: Override static healthy-business thresholds when the user asks for realistic winning bids or live DispatchLand/Sylectus/RPP board behavior is visibly compressed.
authorityRule: True RPM remains the calculation authority, but realistic bid recommendations must account for actual posted targets, broker ceilings, stale/covered board behavior, lane direction, destination quality, and cargo-van-specific clearing evidence.

shortLocalOrReposition.note: Short local/reposition lanes can still show high True RPM but disappear quickly. Bid/call fast.

mediumFeeder.note: Feeder-market cargo-van freight often clears below the old normal floor. Take only if timing and position make sense.

midLengthRecovery.note: Workable only when destination improves access to Tier 1/Tier 2 density or home corridor.

longDisplacement.realisticTrueRpm: 1.20-1.35 visible in weak markets, but not automatically acceptable
longDisplacement.note: Reject cheap long-locks into weak destinations unless the move is intentionally strategic or pays premium.

extremeLongLock.note: Westbound, border, rural, multi-day, or poor reload markets require premium.

MinnesotaTwinCities.rule: Bid to actual target bands when escaping toward Chicago/Indiana/Ohio/Midwest density; avoid cheap south/west displacement.

KansasCity.rule: Prioritize north/east reloads toward STL/Chicago/Indiana/Ohio. Avoid cheap OK/TX southbound gravity.

Northeast.status: cargo-van clearing can be lower than generic market data
Northeast.rule: Use visible board target rates and callback behavior. Do not translate dry-van spot averages directly to cargo-van bids.

MilwaukeeChicagoOhioCorridor.rule: Protect floor when possible. Accept strategic discounts only when the load preserves flow or heads home.

hardRejects: Any load under 0.90 True RPM unless data is wrong
Trap destination without premium or clear exit plan
Heavy cargo-van freight without payload verification
Stale pickup/delivery timing unless broker confirms corrected live appointment
